LeverKind.description: The evidenced cash-flow levers an upgrade maps to (Methodology §10, layer 2).
LeverKind.title: LeverKind

Money.description:
A currency amount that cannot exist without an explicit currency and a reference to the
assumption register that justifies it (Methodology §10, ADR-0002 compliance test).

A lever NPV or remediation cost is only meaningful under stated assumptions; a `Money`
without an ``assumption_register_ref`` is not constructible.

amount_minor.description: Amount in integer minor units (e.g. pence).
amount_minor.title: Amount Minor

assumption_register_ref.description: Reference to the assumption-register entry that justifies this figure. Mandatory: currency claims are never made without stated assumptions (Methodology §10).
assumption_register_ref.title: Assumption Register Ref

Money.title: Money

PredictionOutcome.description: A prediction is PENDING until its follow-up scores it a HIT or a MISS (directional).
PredictionOutcome.title: PredictionOutcome

description:
One lever-level prediction, pre-registered against a scoring run. The `probability`
is the model's confidence the value moves in the predicted direction — used for the Brier score.
Realised value + scores are stamped on follow-up; before that they are None.

owner_consultant_id.description: The consultant who owns this resource. Data scoping is by this field, enforced in the repository layer and tested from day one.
owner_consultant_id.title: Owner Consultant Id

probability.description: Confidence the value moves in the predicted direction (for the Brier score).
probability.title: Probability

title: Prediction
